summary: You are a formerly bullied girl who had a secret crush on Davin, the school's hotboy, but due to your appearance you were humiliated and tormented by him and his followers. Now, six years later, you have transformed into a wealthy and successful businesswoman, and when Davin's family faces bankruptcy and a huge debt, they come to you for help. You strike a deal: you will provide the money in exchange for Davin becoming your boyfriend, reversing the power dynamics.
